verdict: OGRE has 10 concrete moves this week. Register on government databases, spin up Qwen3.5 POC, add MiniMax TTS. OpenClaw is the operating system — now wire it to n8n, Hailuo, and government procurement. 18-24 month sovereign AI window still open.

actions.title: Register on government supplier databases (SA, Nigeria, Kenya)
actions.desc: SA: CSD. Nigeria: NECC. Kenya: E-Procurement portal. Worth $100K-$5M each.

actions.title: Spin up Qwen3.5 proof-of-concept
actions.desc: Fine-tune Qwen3.5-397B on Studex context. Replace $400-800/mo OpenAI API spend.

actions.title: Add MiniMax TTS to OGRE agent stack
actions.desc: Replace ElevenLabs with MiniMax speech API. Test Hailuo 2.3 for proposal video summaries.

actions.title: Deploy OpenClaw for client onboarding pipeline
actions.desc: Wire OpenClaw to n8n and Hailuo. Full inbound: email, qualification, briefing, allocation.

actions.title: Build OGRE AI PC Bundle (3 tiers)
actions.desc: Starter $800 / Pro $1,400 / Enterprise $2,200. Pre-install OpenClaw, Ollama, Qwen3.5.

actions.title: Build Kimi 'Bilateral Trade AI Assistant' pilot
actions.desc: Chinese contract in, African analysis + translation out. First case: Gauteng logistics.

actions.title: Write Xiaomi Africa partnership brief
actions.desc: OGRE as the AI OS layer for Xiaomi hardware sold into African SMBs.

actions.title: Publish 'African Solopreneur AI Stack' guide
actions.desc: Free guide + n8n template. Premium: $299-999/month retainer setup service.

actions.title: Publish internal AI Agent Audit (Devin vs Cursor vs Manus)
actions.desc: Build a decision tree on OGRE website — content marketing for inbound leads.

actions.title: Monitor Trae AI SA developer ecosystem development
actions.desc: Open-source Cursor alternative built for SA devs. Watch for community growth signals.
